zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John FitzAlan III於1246年9月14日出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，他的父親John FitzAlan II23歲，母親Maud de Verdun21歲。他於1260年5月14日之前與Isabel Mortimer在英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可阿盧德爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1272年3月18日在英國史洛普爾可倫享年25歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾豪頓 德斯。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John FitzAlan III was born on 14 September 1246, in Arundel, Sussex, England, his father, John FitzAlan II, was 23 and his mother, Maud de Verdun, was 21. He married Isabel Mortimer before 14 May 1260, in Arundel, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 18 March 1272, in Clun, Shropshire, England, at the age of 25, and was buried in Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John FitzAlan III est né le 14 septembre 1246, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John FitzAlan II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Maud de Verdun, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Mortimer avant 14 mai 1260, à Arundel, West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 18 mars 1272, à Clun, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterré à Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John FitzAlan III am 14. September 1246 in Arundel, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John FitzAlan II 23 und seine Mutter Maud de Verdun 21. Er hat vor 14. Mai 1260 in Arundel, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom Isabel Mortimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 18. März 1272 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Clun, Shropshire, England und wurde in Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John FitzAlan III è nato il il 14 settembre 1246 nel Arundel, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John FitzAlan II, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Verdun, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Mortimer prima del 14 maggio 1260, nel Arundel, West Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 18 marzo 1272, nel Clun, Shropshire, England, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolto a Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John FitzAlan IIIが1246年9月14日にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父John FitzAlan IIは23歳，母Maud de Verdunは21歳であった。1260年5月14日以前にイギリスイギリスウエスト スセックスアルンデルでIsabel Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1272年3月18日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアクルンで25歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアハウトン デメスンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John FitzAlan III(이)가 1246년 9월 14일 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John FitzAlan II(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Verdun(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1260년 5월 14일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 아런들에서 Isabel Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1272년 3월 18일 영국 슈럽실르 클루에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 하우그h턴 데메스니에 묻혔다.

pt.Arundel Castle, West Sussex, England: Arundel, West Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John FitzAlan III nasceu em 14 de setembro de 1246, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John FitzAlan II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Verdun, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Mortimer antes 14 de maio de 1260, em Arundel, West Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de março de 1272, em Clun, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 25 anos, e foi sepultado em Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Arundel Castle, West Sussex, England: Arundel, West Sussex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John FitzAlan III родился 14 сентября 1246 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John FitzAlan II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Verdun, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Mortimer перед 14 май 1260 г. в местности арундель, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 18 марта 1272 г. в местности клун, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 25 лет и был похоронен в местности хотон демесн, шропшир, Англия.

Se casó con Isabel Mortimer antes de 14 de mayo de 1260, en Arundel, West Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1272, en Clun, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultado en Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
